purpose: Finite codebook roundtrip domain for the current substitution graph formula candidate and finite evaluation examples. This checks that every graph-domain code currently exercised by those surfaces decodes through the formal codebook and re-encodes to the same sequence without claiming a general formula correctness proof.
next_as_action: Use this finite roundtrip domain as evidence for the codebook-roundtrip proof case, then prove the general graph-domain roundtrip property before promoting the correctness case.
